parameters.name: ptsort
parameters.label: Point Sort
parameters.description: Sort the points in the input geometry, according to the following criteria:

parameters.name: pointseed
parameters.label: Seed
parameters.description: The random seed when is set to .

parameters.name: pointoffset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shift point order by the amount specified on the offset line.

parameters.name: pointobj
parameters.label: Vector Object
parameters.description: Sort points along a vector defined by the object's transformation values.

parameters.name: primsort
parameters.label: Primitive Sort
parameters.description: Sort the primitives according to the following criteria:

parameters.name: primoffset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shift primitive order by the amount specified on the offset line.

parameters.name: primobj
parameters.label: Vector Object
parameters.description: Sort primitives along a vector defined by the object's translation.

parameters.name: partsort
parameters.label: Particle Sort
parameters.description: Sort the primitives according to the following criteria:

parameters.name: partreverse
parameters.label: Reverse Results
parameters.description: Reverses the result from the Particle Sort as defined above.

parameters.name: partoffset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Shift particle order by the amount specified on the offset line.

parameters.name: partobj
parameters.label: Vector Object
parameters.description: Sort particles along a vector defined by the object's translation.

parameters.name: primproxz
parameters.label: Primproxz
parameters.description: The X, Y and Z coordinates to reference when sorting by Proximity to Point.

parameters.name: pointproxz
parameters.label: Pointproxz
parameters.description: The X, Y and Z coordinates to reference when sorting by Proximity to Point.

parameters.name: partdirz
parameters.label: Partdirz
parameters.description: Allows you to specify a unique vector along which particles can be sorted.

parameters.name: primdirz
parameters.label: Primdirz
parameters.description: Allows you to specify a unique vector along which primitives can be sorted.

parameters.name: partproxz
parameters.label: Partproxz
parameters.description: The X, Y and Z coordinates to reference when sorting by Proximity to Point.

parameters.name: pointdirz
parameters.label: Pointdirz
parameters.description: Allows you to specify a unique vector along which points can be sorted.

examples.label: Configure Primitive Sort and pageindex
examples.description: Common settings from 12 real Derivative examples
